description: Use this API to compare tie lines, as contained in the working case, with those of a designated Saved Case (activity DFTI). It must be referenced using one of the following procedures: - One reference with APIOPT=1, followed by any number of references with APIOPT=2, followed by one reference with APIOPT=3. - One reference with APIOPT=0. This automatically combines the processing of one APIOPT 1 reference, followed by one APIOPT 2 reference, followed by one APIOPT 3 reference. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, seqflg = dfti(sid, apiopt, status, thrsh, cfile)
python_syntax: ierr, seqflg = dfti(sid, apiopt, status, thrsh, cfile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; used only when APIOPT is 0 or 1; 0 by default).

parameters.name: apiopt
parameters.description: Mode of operation of dftiapi. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of five elements specifying comparison options. (input).

parameters.name: thrsh
parameters.description: Difference threshold. (input; used only when APIOPT is 0 or 2; 0.0 by default).

parameters.name: cfile
parameters.description: Name of saved case file in which tie lines are to be compared to those of the working case (when apiopt is 0 or 1). (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: seqflg
return_values.description: An array of two elements specifying returned when APIOPT=0 or 1. (output).

apiopt.description: initialize for case comparison, run the comparison specified by STATUS(4), and run post-processing clean up.

status.description: defines the working case content following an APIOPT=0 or 3 reference (used only when APIOPT is 0, 1 or 3; 0, by default).
flag for method of considering buses in the two cases to be the same bus (used only when APIOPT is 0 or 1; 0 by default).
same bus numbers and extended bus names.
flag for specifying THRESH (used only when APIOPT is 0 or 2; 0 by default).
code for the comparison to be run (used only when APIOPT is 0 or 2; 1 by default).
line rating to be compared when STATUS(4) is 4 (used only when APIOPT is 0 or 2; 0 by default).

seqflg.description: true if there is sequence data in the working case.
true if there is sequence data in the Saved Case in file CFILE.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
